## Run 2 — implementation verified already complete

This is a second agent run for issue #2440 (SEO: Dimmu Borgir 'Death Cult Armageddon' drum setup article).

**Status:** Implementation fully complete from prior run (#2634). No changes needed.

**Verified:**
- `death-cult-armageddon-drum-setup` entry present in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` (line 52318)

- JS syntax valid (`node --check` passes)
- Tama Starclassic Performer + Meinl Byzance gear documented
- Czech Philharmonic / Abbey Road angle covered

title: SEO: Dimmu Borgir 'Death Cult Armageddon' drum setup article (Daray, 2003 — first Dimmu Borgir album article, symphonic black metal TAM anchor)
